headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Miss Raises Questions On Earnings Power And Valuation
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NYSE:NCLH) reported Q4 2025 revenue and operating income that fell short of company and market expectations. The quarter reflected weaker performance relative to major cruise peers and raised questions about cost management and demand trends. The CEO emphasized the company’s resilience and longer term priorities despite the softer quarter. Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings runs a global cruise operation focused on premium and contemporary itineraries, with...
